metadata.source: Placeholder based on CSPB alumni outcomes discussion and current info-session deck, page 5.
metadata.reviewStatus: Replace with approved public outcomes data and methodology before production.

summary: CSPB alumni appear across a range of CS-related and CS-adjacent pathways. This mockup shows how outcomes could be presented without promising individual employment results.
methodologyNote: Production version should clearly identify the data source, collection date, sample size, LinkedIn-visible limitations if applicable, and what the data does and does not claim.

panels.title: CS-related roles
panels.description: A summary area for showing how many visible alumni profiles appear to be in CS-related or CS-adjacent roles.

panels.title: Role pathways
panels.description: A place to group alumni pathways without flattening the program into a single career promise.

panels.title: Industry sectors
panels.description: A visual area for showing that alumni outcomes span multiple sectors rather than only big tech.

caveats: Outcome data should not be framed as a placement guarantee.
Public version should state when the data was collected and how alumni roles were categorized.
Charts should be updated only from an approved controlled data source.
